metadataRecords.resolverPath: GetWorkflowStateForTenantAsync -> project scope authorization + persisted workflow state by project/building
metadataRecords.knownLimitation: No persisted WorkflowId ownership field; scope is project-centric for state reads.

metadataRecords.resolverPath: ResolveScenarioScopeAsync -> scenario metadata -> building/project scope resolver
metadataRecords.knownLimitation: No dedicated persisted WorkflowId column on scenario records in P5-17.

metadataRecords.resolverPath: ResolveJobScopeAsync -> scenario linkage (preferred) -> job project scope fallback
metadataRecords.knownLimitation: Building ownership is indirect via scenario metadata; missing scenario linkage keeps partial coverage.

metadataRecords.resolverPath: GetJobEventsForTenantAsync -> job authorization scope -> list events by job id
metadataRecords.knownLimitation: Events inherit job metadata coverage and do not persist building/workflow ownership columns.

metadataRecords.resolverPath: Scenario history ownership derives from scenario/project linkage
metadataRecords.knownLimitation: No persisted BuildingId/WorkflowId on history events.

resolverCoverage.sourceMetadata: workflow identifier lookup by scenario id first, then job id
resolverCoverage.fallbackBehavior: Returns null when no scenario/job ownership metadata can prove scope.
Uses project/building access resolvers; returns null for invalid or missing ownership metadata.
Falls back to project scope when scenario linkage is unavailable; returns null when ownership metadata is missing.

nonClaims: No full multi-tenant isolation claim yet.
No global EF query filter claim.
No external identity provider integration claim.
